steps.t: Fresh kegs can be picked up near the servants' oven in Winter-home. You should deliver the keg to the festival square, but mind that nobody important …
Fresh kegs can be picked up near the servants' oven in Winter-home and should be brought to the edge of the festival square, where patrons must surely…
Basil Wyndham is in Winter-home, sitting and enjoying the merriment in the festival square. You should speak with the servant Basil Wyndham.
